hero.badge: Introducing KodeKH v2.0 — Now with GPT-4 powered mentoring
hero.titleKh: រៀនសរសេរកូដ
hero.subtitle: The first AI-powered coding platform built for Cambodian students. Learn Python, JavaScript, and more with <mentor>KodeKH</mentor> — your personal AI coding mentor that speaks Khmer.

features.subheading: Powerful tools, Khmer-first content, and AI assistance — all in one platform.

aiMentor.title: KodeKH AI Mentor
aiMentor.desc: Real-time code explanations, debugging help, and personalised learning paths powered by advanced AI.

codePlayground.title: Live Code Playground
codePlayground.desc: Write, run, and test code directly in your browser. Supports Python, JavaScript, HTML/CSS and more.

khmerFirst.title: Khmer-First Learning
khmerFirst.desc: Every lesson, explanation, and mentor response available in Khmer. Learn coding in your native language.

certificates.title: Industry Certificates
certificates.desc: Earn recognised certificates upon course completion. Showcase your skills to employers across Cambodia.

courses.pageSubtitle: Browse our curriculum and learn at your own pace.

python.title: Python Fundamentals
python.titleKh: មូលដ្ឋានគ្រឹះ Python
python.desc: Learn Python from scratch — variables, loops, functions, and object-oriented programming.

react.title: Web Dev with React
react.titleKh: បង្កើតគេហទំព័រ React
react.desc: Build modern web applications with React components, hooks, and state management.

algorithms.title: Algorithms & DSA
algorithms.titleKh: ក្បួនដោះស្រាយ & DSA
algorithms.desc: Master data structures and algorithms — arrays, trees, sorting, and dynamic programming.

howItWorks.subheading: Three simple steps to start your coding journey

choosePath.title: Choose Your Path
choosePath.desc: Pick a course from our Khmer-first curriculum. From beginner Python to advanced algorithms.

codeLearn.title: Code & Learn
codeLearn.desc: Write code in our live playground. KodeKH explains every concept in Khmer as you go.

earnGrow.title: Track & Certify
earnGrow.desc: Follow your personal progress, earn recognised certificates, and showcase your skills to employers.

sokha.name: Sokha Phan
sokha.text: KodeKH helped me land my first tech job. The Khmer explanations made complex algorithms click instantly.

dara.name: Dara Chheng
dara.text: Finally a platform that teaches coding in Khmer! The AI mentor answers my questions better than any textbook.

bopha.name: Bopha Meas
bopha.text: The gamification kept me motivated. I earned 3 certificates in 2 months and doubled my freelance income.

cta.subheading: Join 12,000+ Cambodian students building the future with code.
cta.finePrint: No credit card required • Always free for students

footer.brand: Cambodia's first AI-powered coding education platform. Empowering the next generation of Khmer developers.
footer.copyright: © 2025 KodeKH. Built with ❤️ in Phnom Penh, Cambodia 🇰🇭

dashboard.keepLearning: Keep up your learning momentum — every lesson counts.

auth.registerSubtitle: Join 12,000+ Cambodian students learning to code.
